title: Assumed Revenue by Scenario — Five-Year Illustrative Model
subtitle: Pessimistic / base / optimistic total revenue (USD, annual) — NOT measured traction
description: Derived from financial-projections.json#/assumed_financial_projection. Every point is a modeled_projection built on stated assumptions (conversion rate, ARPU, organic MAU growth, placeholder hardware pricing). Zero revenue today; zero users today. Render with a prominent assumption badge. The base case is the planning case; pessimistic should be shown unprompted alongside it.

annotations.label: Base case adds small Phase 3 pilot revenue

the_message: This is sensitivity analysis, not a forecast. Inputs live in financial-projections.json#/assumed_financial_projection/model_inputs. Replace the entire chart when traction.json has real revenue.
